#nullable enable

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;

namespace Mdrg.ReverseEngineering.Summaries
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Essential summary of the decompiled Il2Cpp.ModsSingleton class.
    ///
    /// What was removed:
    /// - IL2CPP native pointer plumbing.
    /// - NativeFieldInfoPtr / NativeMethodInfoPtr declarations.
    /// - il2cpp_runtime_invoke wrappers.
    /// - Backing fields generated by the compiler.
    /// - Compiler-generated closure/display classes.
    /// - Async state-machine implementation details.
    ///
    /// Main meaning:
    /// ModsSingleton is the central manager for mods, local mod metadata,
    /// translations/localization, Lua environment setup, Lua documentation
    /// generation, and mod import/export.
    ///
    /// Note:
    /// External game-specific types were simplified to object so this summary
    /// remains standalone valid C#. The original signatures are preserved in
    /// comments where useful.
    /// </summary>
    public interface IModsSingletonEssentialApi
    {
        // State / status
        bool RestartRequired { get; }
        bool LocalizationReloadRequired { get; }
        string Log { get; }

        // Paths
        string ModPath { get; }
        string TmpModPath { get; }
        string MainWorkingModPath { get; }
        string ModTranslationsPath { get; }

        // Mods
        IReadOnlyList<object> AllMods { get; }
        IEnumerable<(object Mod, object LocalInfo)> AllModsWithModInfo { get; }
        object? LocalModInfo { get; }

        // Lua
        object? LuaEnvironment { get; }

        // Localization
        // Original: Locale GetLocaleFromCodeOrProject(string localeCode)
        object? GetLocaleFromCodeOrProject(string localeCode);

        // Original: Locale GetModLocaleOrProject(Guid modId)
        object? GetModLocaleOrProject(Guid modId);

        // Original:
        // ModTranslationFileLoadStatusEnum ValidateTranslationFile(
        //     string rawData,
        //     out ModTranslationData data,
        //     out Mod targetMod)
        ModTranslationFileLoadStatusEnum ValidateTranslationFile(
            string rawData,
            out object? data,
            out object? targetMod);

        // Original:
        // ModTranslationFileDeleteStatusEnum DeleteTranslation(
        //     Mod mod,
        //     ModTranslationDataLoaded translationData)
        ModTranslationFileDeleteStatusEnum DeleteTranslation(
            object mod,
            ModTranslationDataLoadedSummary translationData);

        // Original:
        // ReplaceTranslationStatusEnum ReplaceSavedTranslation(
        //     Mod mod,
        //     ModTranslationData modTranslationData,
        //     bool forceReplace)
        ReplaceTranslationStatusEnum ReplaceSavedTranslation(
            object mod,
            object modTranslationData,
            bool forceReplace);

        // Original:
        // bool TryGetAllAvailableTranslations(
        //     Mod mod,
        //     out HashSet<ModTranslationDataLoaded> foundTranslations)
        bool TryGetAllAvailableTranslations(
            object mod,
            out HashSet<ModTranslationDataLoadedSummary>? foundTranslations);

        // Original:
        // bool TryGenerateTranslationData(
        //     Mod mod,
        //     Locale locale,
        //     out ModTranslationData translationData)
        bool TryGenerateTranslationData(
            object mod,
            object locale,
            out object? translationData);

        // Mod paths
        void PrepareTmpPath();

        // Original: string PrepareAndGetWorkingPath(MainModInfoFile infoFile)
        string PrepareAndGetWorkingPath(object infoFile);

        // Original: string GetWorkingPath(Mod mod)
        string GetWorkingPath(object mod);

        // Original: string GetTranslationsDirectory(Mod mod)
        string GetTranslationsDirectory(object mod);

        // Original: string PrepareAndGetTranslationsPath(Mod mod)
        string PrepareAndGetTranslationsPath(object mod);

        // Mod loading / saving
        // Original: Mod LoadModFromFile(string path)
        object? LoadModFromFile(string path);

        // Original: Result LoadModFromZipDataFromOutside(Il2CppStructArray<byte> data)
        object? LoadModFromZipDataFromOutside(byte[] data);

        // Original: Mod LoadModFromStream(Stream data)
        object? LoadModFromStream(object stream);

        // Original: Mod LoadModFromModFiles(IEnumerable<ModFileBase> modFileBases)
        object? LoadModFromModFiles(IEnumerable<object> modFileBases);

        // Original: void RemoveAndDeleteMod(Mod mod)
        void RemoveAndDeleteMod(object mod);

        // Original: Il2CppStructArray<byte> SaveModToZipData(Mod mod)
        byte[]? SaveModToZipData(object mod);

        // Original: Mod GetModByGuid(Guid guid)
        object? GetModByGuid(Guid guid);

        // Local mod metadata
        void LoadLocalModInfo();
        void SaveLocalModInfo();

        // Original: void ToggleLoadOnStart(Mod mod)
        void ToggleLoadOnStart(object mod);

        // Original: void ChangeModOrder(Mod value, int newOrder)
        void ChangeModOrder(object mod, int newOrder);

        // Lua environment / documentation
        void PrepareLuaEnvironment();

        // Original: void DescribeTable(StringBuilder sb, Table table, int depth = 0)
        string DescribeLuaTable(object table, int depth = 0);

        string GenerateLuaDocumentation();
        string GenerateEmptyPersonalityDefinition();

        // Misc
        void FillLocaleInfo();
        void ClearLog();

        // Original: void OnLocaleChanged(Locale newLocale)
        void OnLocaleChanged(object newLocale);

        void OnDestroy();
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Status returned when loading/parsing a mod translation file.
    /// </summary>
    public enum ModTranslationFileLoadStatusEnum
    {
        Success,
        Empty,
        FailedToParse,
        ModNotFound,
        InvalidTranslationFile,
        InvalidLocaleCode
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Status returned when deleting a saved translation file.
    /// </summary>
    public enum ModTranslationFileDeleteStatusEnum
    {
        Success,
        InvalidPath,
        ErrorDeletingFile,
        FileNotFound
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Status returned when replacing a saved translation file.
    /// </summary>
    public enum ReplaceTranslationStatusEnum
    {
        Success,
        FailedToParseLocale,
        HasNewerVersion,
        FailedToDeleteOld
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Simplified version of ModsSingleton.ModTranslationDataLoaded.
    /// Represents a translation file already discovered/loaded for a mod.
    /// </summary>
    public sealed class ModTranslationDataLoadedSummary
    {
        public string Path { get; init; } = string.Empty;

        // Original type: Locale
        public object? TranslationLocale { get; init; }

        // Original type: ModTranslationData
        public object? Data { get; init; }

        public ModTranslationDataLoadedStatusEnum Status { get; private set; }

        // Original:
        // bool TryGetTranslationStatus(out ModdableTable.TranslationStatus translationStatus)
        public bool TryGetTranslationStatus(out object? translationStatus)
        {
            translationStatus = null;
            return false;
        }

        // Original: void AfterLoad(ModdableTable.TranslationStatus loadTranslations)
        public void AfterLoad(object loadTranslations)
        {
            Status = ModTranslationDataLoadedStatusEnum.LoadedAllGood;
        }

        public string Describe()
        {
            return $"{Path} [{Status}]";
        }

        public override string ToString()
        {
            return Describe();
        }

        public enum ModTranslationDataLoadedStatusEnum
        {
            NotLoaded,
            LoadedAllGood,
            LoadedWithIssues
        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Simplified version of ModsSingleton.LocalModInfoContainer.
    /// Stores remembered local settings/metadata for mods, such as load order
    /// and load-on-start state.
    /// </summary>
    public sealed class LocalModInfoContainerSummary
    {
        // Original type: List<SerializableLocalModInfo>
        public List<object> LocalModInfos { get; } = new();

        // Original: void RemoveLocalModInfo(Mod mod)
        public void RemoveLocalModInfo(object mod)
        {
        }

        // Original: void ChangeModOrder(Mod mod, int newOrder)
        public void ChangeModOrder(object mod, int newOrder)
        {
        }

        // Original: bool TryGetLocalModInfo(Guid guid, out SerializableLocalModInfo lmi)
        public bool TryGetLocalModInfo(Guid guid, out object? localModInfo)
        {
            localModInfo = null;
            return false;
        }

        public string GetRememberedNameOrGuid(Guid guid)
        {
            return guid.ToString();
        }

        // Original: SerializableLocalModInfo GetLocalModInfo(Mod mod, bool createIfNotExists = false)
        public object? GetLocalModInfo(object mod, bool createIfNotExists = false)
        {
            return null;
        }

        public void RemoveInvalid()
        {
        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Simplified version of ModsSingleton.ModScriptWindow.
    /// Represents a group of Lua files belonging to a mod. The original class
    /// creates MoonSharp closures from Lua files and executes them.
    /// </summary>
    public sealed class ModScriptWindowSummary
    {
        public const string CurrentModGuidVariableName = "currentModGuid";

        public List<string> LuaFiles { get; } = new();

        // Original type: Mod
        public object? Mod { get; private set; }

        // Original type: List<Closure>
        public List<object> LuaFileClosures { get; } = new();

        // Original: void CreateClosures(string name, Mod mod)
        public void CreateClosures(string name, object mod)
        {
            Mod = mod;
        }

        public void Execute()
        {
        }
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Grouped view of the original ModsSingleton responsibilities.
    /// </summary>
    public static class ModsSingletonResponsibilities
    {
        public static readonly string[] CoreResponsibilities =
        {
            "Load mods from files, streams, zip data, or ModFileBase collections.",
            "Save mods back to zip byte data.",
            "Remove/delete mods and locate mods by Guid.",
            "Maintain all loaded mods and local per-mod metadata.",
            "Control mod load-on-start and mod ordering.",
            "Manage mod working directories and translation directories.",
            "Validate, generate, replace, list, and delete mod translations.",
            "Track restart and localization reload requirements.",
            "Prepare and expose the Lua environment.",
            "Generate Lua documentation and empty personality definition templates.",
            "Compile and execute Lua script windows through MoonSharp closures."
        };

        public static readonly string[] RemovedAsNoise =
        {
            "IL2CPP pointer conversions.",
            "Native field/method token declarations.",
            "Generated property backing fields.",
            "Compiler-generated lambda/display classes.",
            "Async UniTask state-machine internals.",
            "Repeated il2cpp_runtime_invoke boilerplate."
        };
    }
}
